_comment: exp_035 — judger-extraction post-processing fix on top of exp_018. NO model change, NO prompt change. The judger's extract_all_boxed only takes the last contiguous group of \boxed{} answers; multi-part responses with boxes separated by text get truncated to a single box. Strict rule (verified on public, 0 breaks / 8 recoveries / +0.71pp): if question has K>=2 [ANS] markers AND response has >=K boxed expressions AND the judger currently extracts <K items, append the last K boxes as a contiguous 'Final Answer:' trailing block.
_expected_lift_board: 0.005-0.010 if private has similar [ANS]-marked multi-part question fraction
_risk: Near-zero. The rule only ADDS a trailing block to responses where judger currently extracts FEWER answers than expected. Currently-correct responses are left untouched.
